results.title: ‘It’s emotional and shocking:’ Halo Studios devs accuse Pierre Hintze of severe abuse and mistreatment, according to new report
results.description: Hintze apparently mismanaged the whole studio and blamed the devs for it. The post ‘It’s emotional and shocking:’ Halo Studios devs accuse Pierre Hintze of severe abuse and mistreatment, according to new report appeared first on Destructoid .
